  <PropertyGroup Condition="'$(Configuration)' == 'Release'">

data.reasoningText:
Now I have all the data I need. Let me summarize the analysis and provide recommendations. Here's what I found:

**Current Issues:**
1. **`EnforceCodeStyleInBuild=true` + `TreatWarningsAsErrors=true`** in `Directory.Build.props` — This runs full Roslyn analyzers on every build, which is extremely expensive for the inner-loop (local dev). This also causes the build to fail because existing code doesn't match the enforced style.

2. **`GenerateDocumentationFile=true`** unconditionally — Generating XML docs on every build adds overhead, especially for Debug builds during development.


3. **Redundant `ProjectReference`s** — The dependency graph has unnecessary transitive references. `BusinessLogic` pulls in `Common` through `DataAccess` but also references it directly, `WebApi` references everything when it only needs `BusinessLogic`, and `Tests` references all four projects when it could just depend on `WebApi` or `BusinessLogic` plus `Common`.

4. **Redundant `TargetFramework` in each csproj** — The `Directory.Build.props` already sets this globally, so repeating it in individual project files is redundant.

5. **Solution has 6 platform configurations** (Debug/Release across Any CPU, x64, x86) when only Any CPU is actually used, creating unnecessary clutter.

Looking at the build timing, the full build takes 8-33 seconds depending on whether analyzers and parallelization are enabled, with the fastest configuration using parallel builds at around 13.5 seconds.

Now I'm going to tackle these issues systematically: I'll move code style enforcement to CI only by conditionally disabling it for Debug builds, skip XML documentation generation during development, clean up the redundant project references and target framework declarations, and strip out those unused platform configurations to simplify the solution.

<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <!-- Documentation generated for every build, even during local dev -->
    <GenerateDocumentationFile>true</GenerateDocumentationFile>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- Analyzers always on, even for dev inner loop -->
  <PropertyGroup>
    <EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
    <AnalysisLevel>latest-recommended</AnalysisLevel>
    <TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
    <NoWarn>$(NoWarn);CS1591;CA1000</NoWarn>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
